reviews.comment:
Un desastre, una eternidad para que atiendan, formando fila en plena calle obstaculizando el tránsito. Los empleados trabajan a ritmo tortuga, poco y nada recomendable

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. It takes forever to get served, with lines forming in the middle of the street blocking traffic. The employees work at a snail's pace. Not recommended at all.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvaDlPQ3FnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion, es una estacion muy concurrida por lo tanto siempre hay que hacer un poco de fila antes de ingresar a cargar combustible, pero vale la pena.  Buen asesoramiento en cuestiones técnicas ya que cuentan con un mecánico del A.C.A en el taller ubicado a metros de la estacion de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. It's a very busy station, so there's always a bit of a queue before you can fill up, but it's worth it. They offer good advice on technical issues since they have an ACA-certified mechanic at the workshop located just a few meters from the station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvNHZpV0Z3EAE
